name: evaluate_scores
description: Evaluate prediction scores through the CI-1T stability engine. Pass Q0.16 fixed-point scores (0–65535). Returns collapse index, authority level, warn/fault flags, and timing.

scores.description: Array of Q0.16 fixed-point prediction scores. At least 3 for one episode.

name: fleet_evaluate
description: Evaluate multiple model nodes in a fleet round. Returns per-node CI, AL, ghost detection flags, and fleet aggregates.

nodes.description: Array of node score arrays. Each node needs >= 3 Q0.16 scores.

name: interpret_ci1t
description: Interpret CI-1T results in plain language. No API call — local interpretation of CI, AL, ghost status.

results.description: Raw JSON response from evaluate_scores or fleet_evaluate.
